action.description:
Introduced by Representatives DeSanto, Miresse, Anderson, Andraca, Arney, Bare, Brown, Clancy, DeSmidt, Emerson, Fitzgerald, Joers, Madison, McCarville, Palmeri, Roe, Sinicki, Stroud, Tenorio and Udell; 
cosponsored by Senators Habush Sinykin, Spreitzer, Keyeski, Dassler-Alfheim, Hesselbein, L. Johnson, Ratcliff, Roys, Wall and Wirch
